intentSynonyms: get a file content in msword
look up a file content in msword
fetch a single file content in msword
view one specific file content in msword
read text content of a file in msword
description: Read text content of a file by its ID. Works with text-based files (.txt, .md, .csv, .html, .json, .xml, .yaml, .log, etc.). For Word documents (.docx), use get_document_text instead.
